feed.title: Wandering Notebook
feed.subtitle: Personal dev blog; exploring science, thought, and life

entry.title: Resolute Resolutions
entry.summary: Greetings fellow denizens of this celestial rock ball to which we are tethered! We have done it. We have passed through ‘the year which shall not be named’ (and let’s not forget 2019 either!), stepped into a new decade, and taken our first breaths of that 2021 air! We all experienced many hardships this past year physically, mentally, occupationally, financially, spiritually, and more. Through...

entry.title: Hello World
entry.summary: Hello world, and welcome to my little corner of the web! My name is David and I have skirted the idea of making a dev blog for a long while and felt that with 2020 closing, 2021 is a perfect chance to turn over new leaves, indulge in some writing therapy, and give it a shot. I cannot promise that I will post here regularly, perhaps at times I will try experiments in discipline and make routin...
